_description: STM32F103xx errata items. Source: ES0005 (STM32F100/101/102/103/105/107 errata sheet).
_warning: The downloaded ES0005_Errata.pdf is for STM32F20x/F21x (wrong series). These items are from general STM32F103 errata knowledge and need verification against the correct F103 errata sheet. The correct document may have a different ES number.

items.title: I2C peripheral glitch filter limitation
items.description: I2C analog filter does not properly filter spikes shorter than 50ns on SCL/SDA lines. Can cause spurious START/STOP detection in noisy environments.
items.workaround: Add external RC filter on SCL/SDA lines, or use software filtering by sampling pins multiple times.

items.title: SPI CRC transfer length limitation
items.description: SPI CRC calculation may be incorrect when data frame format is set to 8-bit with CRC enabled and transfer count not multiple of 2.
items.workaround: Use 16-bit data frame format for CRC transfers, or pad transfers to even count.

items.title: ADC accuracy degradation at low VDDA
items.description: ADC accuracy (INL/DNL) degrades when VDDA < 2.4V. Datasheet specs only guaranteed for VDDA >= 2.4V.
items.workaround: Ensure VDDA >= 2.4V for ADC operations. Use external voltage reference if necessary.

items.title: USART wakeup from Mute mode spurious wakeup
items.description: USART may spuriously wake from Mute mode when an interrupt coincident with the address match detection occurs.
items.workaround: Re-enter Mute mode in the interrupt handler if spurious wakeup is detected. Check RWU bit in CR1.

items.title: TIM output compare reference clear event limitation
items.description: When the OCxREF signal is cleared by external event (ETRF), the OCx output may not reflect the cleared state until the next update event.
items.workaround: Generate a software update event (set UG bit in EGR) after clearing OCxREF by external event.

items.title: Flash prefetch buffer enable limitation
items.description: Enabling the prefetch buffer while executing from Flash may cause the next instruction fetch to read incorrect data.
items.workaround: Enable prefetch buffer from RAM (execute enable code from SRAM), or enable prefetch before setting PLL as system clock source.

items.title: DMA channel not freeing after transfer completion under certain conditions
items.description: DMA channel may remain enabled (EN bit stays set) after transfer completion when a higher-priority DMA request is active simultaneously with the transfer complete event.
items.workaround: Disable the DMA channel explicitly in the transfer complete interrupt handler before reconfiguring.

items.title: HSE startup time may exceed specification at high temperature
items.description: HSE oscillator startup time may exceed the specified 2ms maximum when operating at ambient temperatures above 85C.
items.workaround: Increase the HSEStartUp_TimeOut value. Monitor HSERDY flag with extended timeout.
